title: JavaScript Fundamentals
description: Master the fundamentals of JavaScript from variables to functions. Build a strong foundation for modern web development.
longDescription: This comprehensive course takes you from zero to hero in JavaScript. You'll learn everything from basic syntax to advanced concepts like closures and asynchronous programming. Each lesson includes interactive challenges, real-world examples, and boss battles to test your skills.
targetAudience: Beginner programmers or developers transitioning from other languages

instructors.name: Alex Code
instructors.title: Senior JavaScript Developer
instructors.bio: 10+ years of JavaScript experience, former Google engineer

seoDescription: Learn JavaScript fundamentals with interactive lessons, challenges, and boss battles. Free comprehensive JavaScript course for beginners.
